overview: I built 9 eval modules and a 4-section Responsible AI dashboard for my SAFe Feature System, starting from 48% compliance (12/25 checks). Key wins: cost guardrails, audit trails, grounding checks, bias detection, and a reusable governance template.

keyPoints.title: Started at 48% — only 12 of 25 responsible AI checks passed
Reviewer agent consumes 80% of total pipeline input tokens
Boosted cases returned 0 inventions; every bare case had at least one
WEBPAGE scores 9.6 points below EXPERIENCE — bias threshold nearly breached
Audit trail CLI saved real debugging time across Days 3 and 4
